workouts.name: The Golden Six
workouts.goal: The classic six-exercise full-body program from the Golden Era
workouts.notes: Run it three days a week. Add weight only when every set is clean — this exact routine built champions.

workouts.name: Golden-Era Chest & Back
workouts.goal: The legendary antagonist superset day: press, then pull, no filler
workouts.notes: Inspired by Golden-Era volume training — pair a chest set with a back set and keep rest short.

workouts.name: Golden-Era Shoulders & Arms
workouts.goal: Cannonball delts and sleeve-filling arms, the classic way
workouts.notes: Golden-Era pump work: moderate loads, full range, and chase the squeeze on every rep.

workouts.name: Golden-Era Legs & Core
workouts.goal: Classic quad-dominant leg training with honest core work
workouts.notes: Front squats keep you upright and humble. Golden-Era rule: never skip calves.

workouts.name: Mass-Monster Leg Day
workouts.goal: Heavy power-bodybuilding legs in the spirit of the mass monsters
workouts.notes: Built like the 90s pros trained: heavy barbell work first, then volume until the legs give out. Lightweight, baby.

workouts.name: Mass-Monster Back & Power
workouts.goal: Deadlift-led back thickness, power-bodybuilding style
workouts.notes: Heavy pulls first while you're fresh, then rows from every angle. Nobody built a big back with light weights.

workouts.name: Arm Blaster Specialization
workouts.goal: A dedicated arm day in the tradition of the sport's great arm specialists
workouts.notes: Volume arm specialization: strict preacher work, no swinging, and triceps get equal billing.
